metadata.title: GenForms.ai | AI Form Generator & Typeform Alternative
metadata.description: Create AI-generated forms, Typeform-style flows, OCR autofill, and webhook integrations for teams collecting data online.
metadata.keywords: AI Form Generator, Typeform Alternative, Conversational Forms, Form Templates, Webhooks

sign_modal.dev_sign_in_tip: This local-only sign in path is enabled for development so you can access protected console pages before OAuth is configured.
sign_modal.no_provider: No sign-in provider is configured for this environment. Enable Google, GitHub, or local development sign-in in .env.local first.

forms.list_description: Manage the AI-generated form drafts that will later become your MVP data intake entry points.
forms.list_section_description: Review share codes, themes, statuses, and creation time, then jump into the next publishing and operations steps.
forms.list_limit_hint: The free plan currently has a form count limit. Upgrade when you are ready to expand.
forms.dashboard_total_forms_hint: How many forms have been created so far
forms.dashboard_plan_paid_hint: Higher form allowance and follow-up capabilities are unlocked
forms.dashboard_plan_free_hint: Upgrade when you are ready to expand beyond the free allowance
forms.dashboard_allowance_unlimited: You can keep creating more forms
forms.dashboard_allowance_unlimited_hint: This plan is not blocked by the free form-count limit
forms.dashboard_latest_form_empty_hint: The newest draft will appear here after creation
forms.new_description: Start from one sentence, preview the generated schema, then save it as a draft.
forms.creator_flow_description: Describe the form in one sentence, choose a visual direction, then review and save the draft as a shareable form.
forms.creator_flow_step_1_title: Describe what you want to collect
forms.creator_flow_step_1_description: Use business language to explain the scenario, the audience, and the core fields you want to capture.
forms.creator_flow_step_2_description: Choose a softer, more formal, or more tech-forward look depending on the scene you are building.
forms.creator_flow_step_3_description: Confirm the title, description, and schema, then save it and move into sharing and delivery.
forms.plan_tip_free: Free plan: {current}/{limit} forms used. Upgrade or raise the local test allowance when you need more.
forms.plan_tip_paid: Paid plan active. You can create more than one form.
forms.limit_reached_description: You have already reached the current form limit for this plan. Upgrade to continue creating more forms.
forms.generator_description: Describe the form you need in one sentence. We will generate a structured draft first, then you can save it as a form.
forms.generator_example_1: Event registration form with name, mobile number, attendee count, and notes
forms.generator_example_2: Customer feedback form with satisfaction score, suggestions, and contact details
forms.generator_example_3: Receipt collection form with invoice image, applicant name, and reimbursement remark
forms.generator_prompt_hint: Be specific about the scenario, the audience, and the fields you want. Better input usually leads to a stronger first draft.
forms.prompt_placeholder: Example: Build a receipt collection form with invoice image, applicant name and remark.
forms.draft_preview_description: Adjust the title and description before saving the draft.
forms.workspace_description: The main preview now sits in the center. What you see there is much closer to the final public form experience.
forms.workspace_left_description: Set the title, description, and theme first. The live preview updates as you edit.
forms.workspace_left_note_description: The center panel focuses on the real fill-out experience, while the right side keeps structure review available when needed.
forms.workspace_right_description: Use this side panel to verify order, field types, and the raw schema without breaking the main preview flow.
forms.workspace_sidebar_description: Keep the editing controls and structure review on the side so the main preview stays calm and readable.
forms.preview_footer_hint: This preview is intentionally close to the final fill-out experience the respondent will see.
forms.save_limit_error: Free plan users have reached the current form limit. Upgrade to create more.
forms.prompt_required: Please describe the form you want to build.
forms.regenerate_hint: You can revise the prompt above and generate again. The new result will replace the current draft.
forms.detail_description: This draft is ready for the next batch where we wire submission, workflow and billing.
forms.detail_share_hint: Copy this link to distribute it directly, or use the QR code below for mobile sharing.
forms.detail_schema_description: Review the field structure, helper copy, and raw schema that will drive the public form experience.
forms.detail_metric_total_submissions_hint: See how many real submissions this form has received so far
forms.detail_metric_autofill_hint: Shows how many submissions were enriched by OCR and structured auto-fill
forms.share_link_copy_failed: Failed to copy the share link.
forms.field_options_hint: Enter one option per line. We will generate internal values automatically.
forms.field_delete_guard: Keep at least one field before saving this draft.
forms.share_theme_story_minimal: Best for softer, lighter intake moments. The page feels calmer and the flow reads like a quiet confirmation journey.
forms.share_theme_story_business: Best for structured business scenarios. The hierarchy is clearer and fits lead capture, registration, and operational submissions.
forms.share_theme_story_dark: Best when you want a more distinctive, tech-forward presence. Higher contrast and atmosphere make the form more memorable.
forms.share_description_fallback: Fill this mobile-friendly form and submit one answer at a time.
forms.share_premium_hint: We break the flow into quieter, more focused single-question steps so the mobile experience feels closer to a premium form product.
forms.share_submission_tip: Submission capability will be connected in the next batch. This page is currently used to verify share-link accessibility and form preview.
forms.submitted_message: Your response has been recorded and the follow-up processing has started.
forms.question_focus_hint: Focus on this one answer first, then move forward when you're ready.
forms.final_question_hint: This is the final question. Review it once, then submit when ready.
forms.review_before_submit: Take a final glance before you submit. Delivery and logging will start immediately after this step.
forms.share_mobile_first_badge: Mobile-first. One question at a time.
forms.share_navigation_hint: You can always go back and refine the previous answer.
forms.share_navigation_start: Start here and move through one question at a time.
forms.share_continue_hint: Continuing will take you to the next step.
forms.share_submit_hint: Submitting will start delivery and logging immediately.
forms.file_submit_tip: For the current local demo, uploaded files are recorded by file name and metadata first.
forms.billing_tip: Each submission currently consumes 1 credit from the form owner.
forms.webhook_settings_description: Send each submission to your external system after processing completes.
forms.webhook_provider_generic_tip: Best for custom systems, Zapier, Make, or any generic endpoint. Use advanced authentication only when you know what the receiver expects.
forms.webhook_provider_feishu_tip: Best for Feishu group bot notifications. We send a Feishu-compatible text payload, and the common security choices are keyword or signature.
forms.webhook_provider_dingtalk_tip: Best for DingTalk bot notifications. We send a DingTalk-compatible text payload, and the common security choices are keyword or signed requests.
forms.webhook_provider_wecom_tip: Best for WeCom group bot notifications. In most cases, the bot URL is enough to start delivering messages.
forms.webhook_provider_slack_tip: Best for Slack Incoming Webhook notifications. In most cases, the Webhook URL is enough.
forms.webhook_secret_placeholder: Optional secret used to sign each request
forms.webhook_secret_tip: When provided, requests include an X-AIFactory-Signature header.
forms.webhook_keyword_placeholder: Keyword or token required by the receiver
forms.ocr_settings_description: Choose the OCR template that best matches this form so recognition and structuring stay aligned.
forms.ocr_template_general_image_tip: Use this for general image OCR without a specialized document format.
forms.ocr_template_invoice_tip: Optimized for invoice-style understanding, including amounts, invoice numbers, and dates.
forms.ocr_template_receipt_tip: Optimized for receipts and ticket slips, focusing on merchant, amount, and time.
forms.ocr_template_id_card_tip: Optimized for ID documents, focusing on names and identification numbers.
forms.qr_code_description: Scan this code on mobile to open the public share page directly.

submissions.title: {title} Submissions
submissions.description: Review the submission records that have been collected from the share page.

webhooks.title: {title} Webhook Logs
webhooks.description: Review outbound webhook records generated after each submission run.

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.tip: Please keep your apikey safe to avoid leaks

blog.title: AI Form Builder Resources
blog.description: Guides for AI form generation, Typeform alternatives, webhook workflows, templates, NPS surveys, and publishable data collection.

my_invites.title: My Invites
my_invites.invite_tip: Invite 1 friend to buy GenForms.ai, reward $50.
my_invites.no_orders: You can't invite others before you bought GenForms.ai
my_invites.no_affiliates: You're not allowed to invite others, please contact us to apply for permission.
